response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with strong open-source contributions and tooling interests, but lacks explicit, recent experience with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure is minimal and outdated, and his focus has shifted to TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions and tooling passion (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven ability to work across diverse stacks and build developer-facing tools
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or demonstrable experience with Spring, Hibernate, or JVM-based enterprise frameworks
Java skills appear outdated and are not highlighted in recent roles
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM or IDE internals
